name: lmaobox-context
description: Zero-config MCP server extension for Lmaobox Lua docs, types, bundling, and linting in VS Code.

commands.title: Lmaobox Context: Install Or Update Runtime
Lmaobox Context: Open Bundled Docs Folder
Lmaobox Context: Sync External MCP Configs

lmaoboxContext.autoConfigureMcp.description: Automatically write the MCP server entry into VS Code user settings after the runtime is installed.

lmaoboxContext.releaseTag.description: Override the GitHub release tag to install. Leave empty to use the extension version as v<version>.

lmaoboxContext.repoOwner.description: GitHub owner used when downloading the packaged runtime release.

lmaoboxContext.repoName.description: GitHub repository used when downloading the packaged runtime release.

lmaoboxContext.autoInjectExternalMcpConf.description: Automatically inject Lmaobox MCP server entries into external tool config files (Cursor/Windsurf/Claude) when runtime is installed.

lmaoboxContext.externalMcpServerName.description: Server key used in external mcpServers JSON files.

lmaoboxContext.externalMcpConfigPath.description: Optional absolute path to an additional MCP config JSON file to update (for custom editors).
